summary: DVS doesn't control how many Collaborative Case Management housing vouchers it gets each year — that number is set by outside voucher allocators, mainly local VA medical facilities. The agency's own reporting attributes the jump to 114 available vouchers in FY26 (from 37 the year before) to a larger allocation from those partners, not a change in DVS operations.

sources.label: DVS, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
